name: Pineapple Microwave Bread Pudding
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Bread cubes, stale or toasted
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized mixing bowl, beat together the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the beaten eggs, milk, and vanilla extract to the bowl with the butter and sugar. Mix well.
3. Drain any excess liquid from the crushed pineapple and add it to the mixture.
4. Fold in the bread cubes until evenly distributed throughout the batter.
5. Pour the mixture into a 1.5-liter (1 1/2 quart) casserole dish.
6. Cook on medium heat for 15-20 minutes, or until firm.
7. Top with whipped cream or vanilla ice cream before serving.
SERVES: 4-6
